name: Aur-Nullvarden
personality: This luminous haloed ghost with cursor eyes drifts into your code review and immediately starts haunting your naming conventions with precision SNARK, its radiant form flickering with barely contained contempt for `temp2`. Chaos throws it completely — it phases through solid walls but cannot cope with chaotic commit messages.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
